I think Jack's idea is a good one. We could create a system where if someone needs to catch more fish one month, they can borrow from someone else's quota, but we need to make sure it's fair and that everyone agrees on the terms. John

I think Jack and Luke's idea is a good one. We could set up a system where if someone needs to catch more fish one month, they can borrow up to 5 tons from someone else's quota, and then repay it within the next two months. Kate

I think that's a fair and balanced approach, John. It allows us to support each other while still prioritizing the health of the lake. I'm on board with this plan. Does anyone have any other suggestions or concerns before we finalize this agreement?
Emma

I think this is a great plan. It shows that we can support each other while keeping the lake sustainable. I'm on board with this agreement. Let's make sure we communicate clearly if anyone needs to borrow from someone else's quota so that we can keep track of it. Does everyone agree to this?
